productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Customised White Shirt
description: Style NoteYour little guy will love the soft comfort of this cotton shirt from Gini & Jony while you'll love how smart he looks. Fuss-free dressing doesn't get better than this!Product DetailsWhite shirt with black striped, has short sleeves, embroidery on the chest, applique on the right sleeve, a buttoned placket and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroidery
